title: Emerging Currencies Shake Off Early Rout as Dollar Retreats
description: Most developing-world currencies reversed early losses on Tuesday as the dollar’s initial strength faded and global markets rebounded from a selloff driven by geopolitical tensions and concerns over the disruptive impact of artificial intelligence.
content: Most developing-world currencies reversed early losses on Tuesday as the dollar’s initial strength faded and global markets rebounded from a selloff driven by geopolitical tensions and concerns over the disruptive impact of artificial intelligence.
